body_template:
Hi {{candidate_name}},

Great news! After reviewing your application for the {{role}} position, we'd like to invite you to an AI voice interview.

Your profile matched {{match_score}}/100 against our requirements, and our team has approved moving forward.

Start your interview here (the link is personal to you and works once):
{{interview_link}}

It takes about 10 minutes - you'll answer a few questions about your experience by voice (or by typing). Best done in Chrome with your microphone enabled.

Best regards,
The AgentHire Recruiting Team
